brand_dna.category: Veteran-owned, small-batch coffee roaster selling single origins, blends, flavored coffee, and nautical-themed gear online.
brand_dna.core_belief: Drink Coffee & Do Good - deliver premium fresh roasted coffee while making a positive impact, supporting the military community and ethical sourcing.
proof_points: Veteran-owned, founded by former U.S. Navy Supply Corps officer Neil Kittleson
5% of every order donated to the Navy-Marine Corps Relief Society; SS John W Brown line donates 10% to Project Liberty Ship
Small-batch roasted to order and shipped fresh within 3 to 5 business days
Quarterly micro-loans to coffee farmers through Kiva.org via the Loans That Lift program
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, mission-driven roaster with a bold nautical/military identity - warmer and more purpose-led than commodity coffee.

voice_pillars.name: Nautical Storyteller
voice_pillars.desc: Writes in sailor and sea language, turning every cup into a voyage and every customer into crew.
voice_pillars.quote: set sail with salty sailor and set your sights on a new brew

voice_pillars.name: Mission-Driven
voice_pillars.desc: Ties the product to service, charity, and giving back in plain, sincere terms.

voice_pillars.name: Craft and Honest
voice_pillars.desc: Leans on freshness and roast-to-order craft without fuss or overclaiming.
voice_pillars.quote: Sustainably and ethically sourced, honest flavor, no fuss.

voice_pillars.name: Warm and Sensory
voice_pillars.desc: Describes flavor with vivid, appetite-driving imagery rooted in real tasting notes.
voice_pillars.quote: the galley smells like dessert is already underway

phrases: roasted to order so it lands in your hands fresh
join the Crew and never run dry
sailing the world in search of the perfect coffee

icp: Coffee lovers with a military or patriotic connection - veterans, active service, first responders, and their families - who want fresh premium coffee and feel good buying from a brand that gives back.

personas.name: Grateful Veteran
personas.description: Former or active service member who buys to support a veteran-owned brand and NMCRS; moved by the mission and the military discount.

personas.name: Fresh-Roast Enthusiast
personas.description: Serious coffee drinker who cares about roast-to-order freshness, single origins, and tasting notes; moved by craft and quality angles.

personas.name: Cause-Driven Gifter
personas.description: Shopper looking for a meaningful gift for the sailor or coffee lover in their life; moved by story, charity, and themed collections.

products_ladder.title: The Midwatch: Unisex Skeleton Heavyweight T-Shirt
Davy Jones' Locker: Cold Brew Blend
My Cinnamon Girl:  Cinnamon Bun Flavored Coffee
Kraken's Cocoa Kiss: Mocha Flavored Coffee

offers: 10% veteran/active military/first responder discount (site states 15% via GovX on FAQ)
Crew Membership subscription: half-price shipping, save on every shipment, cancel anytime
Subscribe and Save tiers up to 20% off
Flat shipping $5.00 first item, $1.50 each additional, capped at 6 items
5% of every order to NMCRS; 10% on SS John W Brown line to Project Liberty Ship
Interactive quiz to find your perfect roast

allowed.claim: Veteran-owned coffee brand founded by a former U.S. Navy Supply Corps officer.
Small-batch roasted to order and shipped fresh within 3 to 5 business days.
5% of every order donated to the Navy-Marine Corps Relief Society; 10% on SS John W Brown coffees to Project Liberty Ship.
Quarterly micro-loans to coffee farmers through Kiva.org via the Loans That Lift program.
Crew Members get half-price shipping and subscription savings, cancel anytime.

banned.claim: Coffee that boosts immunity or strengthens your immune system.
banned.why: Banned immunity claim - not supported and disallowed for food/beverage health claims.
Unqualified 'detox' is banned for this category.

banned.claim: Burns fat or aids weight loss.
banned.why: Banned fat-burning/weight-loss claim with no label support.

banned.claim: Prevents, treats, or cures any disease or condition.
banned.why: Disease-treatment claims are prohibited for food and beverage.

banned.claim: Low sugar or high antioxidant as a headline claim.
banned.why: Nutrient-content claims must match the actual label; not verified in the input.

banned.claim: Using 'all natural' or 'clean' as a headline promise.
banned.why: 'Natural' and 'clean' are vague and risky as headline claims.
